name: Cold Fruited Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Seedless red or green grapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dried apricot halves, chopped onion, white wine, orange juice, and red wine vinegar in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. In a large bowl, combine the apricot mixture with chicken, orange segments, grapes, almonds, parsley, pepper, salt, and crushed red pepper flakes.
4. Cover and chill for 1-2 hours.
5. Spoon the chilled chicken mixture onto a lettuce-lined platter to serve.
PER SERVING: 229 calories, 24.5 g protein, 19.7 g carbohydrate, 1.7 g fiber, 59 g cholesterol, 132 mg sodium, 616 mg potassium.
